goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should 'arrive by 09:30'.
The train should depart from 'ely' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'tenpin'.
Make sure you get 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on wednesday and should arrive by 09:30
The train should depart from ely and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and price
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called tenpin
